name: Scratch Golf Lab - Mapleton
about: Scratch Golf Lab Mapleton offers private, luxury indoor golf bays powered by Trackman technology. It provides year-round practice in perfect conditions with access to tour-level data for serious golfers looking to improve their game. The facility emphasizes a distraction-free environment focused on data-driven improvement and offers membership options with varying hour allocations and booking capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Trackman data provides critical insights for game improvement
24/7 private access allows training on any schedule
Year-round perfect conditions eliminate weather limitations
Private luxury bays ensure a distraction-free practice environment
Certified instructors offer data-driven swing lessons

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor providing precise tour-level data
